coreCompetencies: Basic understanding of how software is deployed in a customer environment

Elementary knowledge of debugging in unfamiliar environments with logs
Basic understanding of professional communication with customers

Familiarity with data formats such as CSV and JSON
Elementary understanding of the product being deployed
indicators: Requires constant supervision
Can complete simple tasks with detailed guidance
Needs 3-6 months to be productive
